meaning: adj.硬的,坚固的,(问题,工作等)困难的,艰苦的,猛烈的,确实的adv.努力地,辛苦地,坚硬地,牢固地,接近地,猛烈地
examples: He succinctly summed up his manifesto as "Work hard, train hard and play hard."
Mr Paes promised to "work hard and treat the citizens with a lot of respect".
Those structured products have fallen on hard times as the mortgage sector sinks deeper into crisis.
